texto: The people who burned witches at the stake never for one moment thought of their act as violence rather they thought of it as an act of divinely mandated righteousness. The same can be said of most of the violence humans have ever committed.
explicacao: Citação de Gil Bailie sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “The people who burned witches at the stake never for one moment thought of their act as violence …” articula fe, religion, violence em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como violence.
